title: voglera hispanica
side_effects: Voglera hispanica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to excessive consumption. Additionally, using the plant's extracts without proper knowledge can lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and swelling. Furthermore, Voglera hispanica can interact with certain medications, resulting in reduced efficacy or increased toxicity. In severe cases, prolonged or excessive use can cause liver damage and other organ-related complications.
